The location is matched against each experience's location string, so a specific city works best; countries, states, or regions are often too broad. Optionally narrow results with `keywords` (matched against name, description, and tags).

keywords.description: Optional keywords to filter results, e.g. 'snorkel reef'.

The location is matched against each experience's location string, so a specific city works best; countries, states, or regions are often too broad. Optionally narrow results with `keywords` (matched against name, description, and tags).

keywords.description: Optional keywords to filter results, e.g. 'snorkel reef'.

function.name: get_experience_details
function.description: Get full details for an experience by its ID.

function.name: check_availability
function.description: Check availability and pricing for an experience, optionally on a date and for a number of tickets.

function.name: purchase_tickets
function.description: Purchase tickets for an experience.

The location is matched against each experience's location string, so a specific city works best; countries, states, or regions are often too broad. Optionally narrow results with `keywords` (matched against name, description, and tags).

keywords.description: Optional keywords to filter results, e.g. 'snorkel reef'.

function.name: get_experience_details
function.description: Get full details for an experience by its ID.

function.name: check_availability
function.description: Check availability and pricing for an experience, optionally on a date and for a number of tickets.

function.name: purchase_tickets
function.description: Purchase tickets for an experience.

messages.content: You are a helpful travel booking assistant. Use the provided tools to search for experiences, look up details, check availability, and purchase tickets. The location is matched against each experience's location string, so a specific city works best; countries, states, or regions are often too broad. Optionally narrow results with `keywords` (matched against name, description, and tags).

keywords.description: Optional keywords to filter results, e.g. 'snorkel reef'.

function.name: get_experience_details
function.description: Get full details for an experience by its ID.

function.name: check_availability
function.description: Check availability and pricing for an experience, optionally on a date and for a number of tickets.

function.name: purchase_tickets
function.description: Purchase tickets for an experience.

messages.content: You are a helpful travel booking assistant. Use the provided tools to search for experiences, look up details, check availability, and purchase tickets. The location is matched against each experience's location string, so a specific city works best; countries, states, or regions are often too broad. Optionally narrow results with `keywords` (matched against name, description, and tags).

keywords.description: Optional keywords to filter results, e.g. 'snorkel reef'.

function.name: get_experience_details
function.description: Get full details for an experience by its ID.

function.name: check_availability
function.description: Check availability and pricing for an experience, optionally on a date and for a number of tickets.

function.name: purchase_tickets
function.description: Purchase tickets for an experience.
